case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. MACCO TRANSPORTATION LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MICHAEL D. FRISCHER RE SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT VIA CERTIFIED MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 100147509) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
DECLARATION OF JOSEPH JYOO RE ATTORNEYS FEES, INTEREST AND COST IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100152550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACCO TRANSPORTATION LLC $8,193.91 PRINCIPAL, $1,150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,274.52 INTEREST, $379.20 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,997.63, SEE SCANNED DOC
